description_long: This obelisk features a rectangular, slightly tapered body made of a material resembling polished wood, with a prominent golden plaque affixed to its front face. The plaque displays an engraved depiction of a stylized tower or monument at the top, with several lines of text in a script that appears to be Persian or Arabic, rendered in gold. The obelisk's surface is smooth and flat, with the plaque providing the only raised detail. The sides are thin and unadorned, emphasizing the flatness of the structure. The back is plain, lacking any inscriptions or decorative elements, while the overall form is monolithic and commemorative in nature. The object is likely intended as a memorial or informational marker in an urban environment.
description: A flat, rectangular obelisk with a polished wood-like body and a golden plaque featuring engraved text and a stylized tower motif.
description_view_0: Front view showing the golden plaque with engraved text and a stylized tower motif on a polished wood-like surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the obelisk and the protrusion of the golden plaque.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned wood-like surface with no inscriptions or decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness and the slight protrusion of the plaque.
attribute_inscription: There is a gold-colored inscription on the front plaque, written in Persian or Arabic script, with clear and legible lines arranged beneath a stylized tower motif.
attribute_ornamentation: The only ornamentation is the engraved depiction of a stylized tower or monument at the top of the front plaque.
attribute_base_design: The base is flat and rectangular, continuous with the rest of the obelisk, with no visible steps, platforms, or additional decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and rectangular, matching the rest of the obelisk, with no unique features or decorations.
